---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature request in one or two sentences.

## Problem statement

What limitation or pain point does this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe your preferred approach.

## Alternatives considered

List any alternatives or workarounds.

## API/design impact

Does this change public API shape, behavior, or docs?

## Testing plan

How should this be validated (`package` tests, `test-project` flows, etc.)?

## Additional context

Examples, references, or related issues.
